title: Thai-Style Pork Bites
description: A simple and flavorful Thai-inspired dish made with crispy pork bites, served with a tangy dipping sauce. Enjoy as an appetizer or snack.
instructions: 2. In a shallow dish, mix together the flour, minced garlic, and a pinch of salt.
3. Add the sliced pork to the flour mixture and toss to coat evenly.
4. Dip each coated pork slice into the beaten eggs and then roll in panko breadcrumbs to coat.
5. Place the coated pork slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
7. While the pork is baking, prepare the dipping sauce by mixing together equal parts of soy sauce and fish sauce in a small bowl.
8. Once the pork is done, remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
9. Serve the crispy pork bites with the tangy dipping sauce for a delicious snack or appetizer.
10. Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro or scallions, if desired.
